violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the bar. Towels out.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door gaskets noted not clean
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood and filters above deep fryers noted need cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Counter by dishwasher noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interior of reach-in prep cooler and reachin cooler door gaskets noted in need of cleaning.
